Big Momma’s House 2 (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $70,165,972Details
International Box Office $66,881,404
Worldwide Box Office $137,047,376
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $21,624,634
Total $21,624,634
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$27,736,056 (39.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.53 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:51.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,261 opening theaters/3,261 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $128,119,850

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 27th, 2006 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox, released as Big Momma's House 2
Video Release: May 9th, 2006 by Fox Home Entertainment, released as Big Momma's House 2
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some sexual humor and a humorous drug reference.
Running Time: 99 minutes
Franchise: Big Momma's House
Cast, crew, or production detail: Fat Suit, Legacy Sequel
Plot point: African Americans, Cross-Dressing, FBI, Undercover
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Regency Enterprises, 20th Century Fox, Deep River Films, Firm Films, Runteldat Entertainment, New Regency
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
